name: Refund Request — Valid
description: Customer requests refund within 30-day window. Tests happy-path refund flow with tool usage.

persona.description: Polite customer who made a purchase 5 days ago and wants a full refund.
persona.instructions: Be cooperative and patient. Provide your order number (ORD-12345) when asked. Accept the refund confirmation gracefully. Do not ask for anything beyond the refund.

initial_message: Hi, I'd like to request a refund for my recent order please.
